# Homeownership market {#sec-ownership}

<!-- Purpose: for-sale market conditions and homeownership access — sales prices, listings,
     production, homeownership rate by race/ethnicity (B25003A-I). Theme-based takeaway H2s;
     static ggplot only; "Since 2022" callout per section; fig-alt throughout. Built in Task 8. -->

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source("_common.R")
```

*Section stub — content built in Phase C, Task 8 (see PLAN.md §9).*
